The New York Times and Scripps Howard post-election analysis

March/April 2001
Investigative MethodsGovernment & Politics

The New York Times and Scripps Howard post-election analysis will be available at the IRE Resource Center, which can be contacted at (573) 882-3364.

The New York Times and the Scripps Howard post-election analysis discussed in Ron Nixon's story on page eight will be available soon at the IRE Resource Center. The contact number to the Resource Center is (573) 882-3364
